topic_coverage.quoted_user_text: Delete plan geht immer noch nicht — operator cannot remove unwanted plans from /planning after BUG-0014 AS1 shipped.
PlanningPage.tsx activePlanId useMemo ignores selectedPlanId when global is_active plan exists; delete button disabled via activePlanIsSelected.
topic_coverage.delegation_scope: frontend/src/pages/PlanningPage.tsx L110-113, L643-683; backend delete_plan unchanged
topic_coverage.delegation_rationale: Code audit: activePlanId always resolves to is_active plan, dropdown onChange sets selectedPlanId but useMemo never prefers it when active exists.

topic_coverage.quoted_user_text: Preserve DEC-0082 active-plan delete 409 guard; regression in plan selector not API; single-plan operators need documented workaround or sole-plan delete path.
With 2+ plans: select non-active in dropdown, Delete plan succeeds; active plan delete blocked in UI and returns 409; npm/cargo plan delete tests green.
Operator deletes non-active plans from /planning with confirmation; active plan requires switching active first per DEC-0082 copy.

decomposition.rationale: Narrow regression on plan delete UX delivered in BUG-0014 AS1 — single root cause in plan selector state, not multi-surface cluster.
alternatives_considered: Reopen BUG-0014 — rejected (DONE Q0022; distinct selector regression post-release)
Split UI vs API — rejected (DELETE API and 409 guard verified; defect is frontend selectedPlanId ignored)
